message:
fix(web): add runtime validation for evidence pack JSON parsing

The evidence page was using an unsafe type assertion when parsing the
evidence.json file. This adds a validateEvidencePack function that
performs runtime checks to ensure the parsed JSON conforms to the
expected EvidencePack structure before use.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
